mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, o.customer_id AS customerId, c.customer_name AS customerName, c.address AS customerAddress, o.group_id AS groupId, g.name AS groupName, o.generation, o.order_type AS orderType, o.is_async AS isAsync, o.belong_company AS belongCompany, o.produce_company AS produceCompany, o.gen_no AS genNo, o.remark, o.create_by AS createBy, o.create_time AS createTime, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.status_time AS statusTime FROM yk_order_info o LEFT JOIN yk_customer_info c ON o.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN yk_subject_group_info g ON o.group_id = g.id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.order_id FROM yk_order_info o WHERE o.order_status = '订单生成' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM yk_sample_info s WHERE s.order_id = o.order_id ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM yk_sample_info s WHERE s.order_id = o.order_id AND s.flow_name NOT IN ('模板取消', '报告成功', '报告取消') )
mapper.update:
UPDATE yk_order_info SET order_status = '订单出库', status_time = NOW() WHERE order_id IN
#{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT order_id FROM yk_order_info WHERE order_status = '订单出库' AND status_time IS NOT NULL AND status_time <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{hours} HOUR) AND (remark IS NULL OR remark NOT REGEXP '[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]')
mapper.update:
UPDATE yk_order_info SET order_status = '订单完成', status_time = NOW() WHERE order_id IN
#{orderId}
